all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have everlasting life.
John 3:16
Quote of the Day
"Primary songs … hold the power to stay with children for a lifetime, becoming part of their discipleship."
Sister Tracy Y. Browning | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
